atoms.source_snippet: Scheduled, AsyncCommitment, AsyncSettlement, Passkey variants in to/from compact
atoms.semantic_claim: Typed transaction compact encoding and decoding dispatches scheduled, async commitment, async settlement, and passkey variants to their dedicated codecs.

destinations.evidence: Destination `to_compact` and `from_compact` include all four custom variants.

atoms.source_snippet: cond_mod!(..., passkey, scheduled, async_commitment, txtype, async_settlement); mod spc_call;
atoms.semantic_claim: The transaction codec module wires passkey, scheduled, async commitment, async settlement, and SPC call codec modules into the alloy transaction codec tree.

destinations.evidence: Destination `cond_mod!` includes async_commitment, async_settlement, passkey, scheduled, spc_call, and txtype.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Cargo-check imports for each custom transaction codec module under the alloy feature.

summary: Custom typed transaction compact dispatch and module wiring are present.
